title: Jobin Wok Non Stick with Lid, 28cm Aluminium Wok Frying Pan, Large Capacity for Cook Asian Dishes for 3-5 People, Ideal for Induction, Gas, All Hobs
features: 【𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋】Our wok non stick is made of high-quality aluminium material, which is durable and able to withstand high heat. This feature ensures that the pan will last for years and provide consistent performance!
【𝐍𝐎𝐍 𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐊 𝐖𝐎𝐊】We ensure that our aluminium wok is pre-seasoned to maintain a non-stick surface, so you don't have to worry about toxins, making your cooking healthier and safer.

【𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆】Wok with lid non stick respond quickly to heat regulation and their special design maintain the juices and flavours of ingredients inside the wok. The threaded pan bottom has better heat transfer and adsorption properties, and its texture makes the food fit the wok better, speeding up the transfer of heat to the food, thus cooking the food more evenly and maintaining its original flavour.

【𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐁𝐈𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 & 𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘】This wok frying pan is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, ceramic and so on. Perfect for Asian cooking. Its versatile design also allows for other types of cooking, such as soup, stir-frying, stew, and frying!

【𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐄】 The 28cm wok with lid features an ergonomic soft grip and cool touch handle that ensures both your comfort and safety when creating foods in the kitchen. The wok body weighs 1.75KG and is 28CM wide and 9CM deep, and can serve at least 3-5 people food portions, which is ideal for the whole family or small gatherings.
